title: Lacuna config (.lacuna.json)
description: Configuration for the lacuna CLI. See https://github.com/Octagon-simon/lacuna

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor completion.

testRunner.description: Test runner. Auto-detected from your project dependencies if omitted.

coverageFormat.description: Coverage report format your test runner produces.

coverageDir.description: Directory where your test runner writes its coverage report.

sourceDir.description: Source directory (or directories) to scan for coverage gaps. A string, or an array like ["src","lib"] when source lives in multiple top-level dirs.

threshold.description: Minimum line-coverage % a file must reach to be considered covered.

maxIterations.description: How many times to retry a failing generated/fixed test before giving up.

coverageTimeout.description: Seconds before the test suite is killed — guards against hung open handles (unclosed servers, timers).

testDir.description: Optional explicit test directory. Rarely needed — test locations are auto-detected.

ignore.description: Path substrings to exclude from gap detection, e.g. ["src/graphql/", "src/theme/"].

mocksFile.description: Path to a shared mock file every generated test imports from, e.g. "src/test/mocks.ts".

setupFile.description: Path to your test setup file. Its contents are shown to the AI so it knows which globals/matchers exist.

provider.description: AI provider. "anthropic" uses the Anthropic SDK; "openai-compatible" covers DeepSeek, OpenAI, Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, etc.

baseURL.description: API base URL. Required for the "openai-compatible" provider.

apiKeyEnv.description: Name of the environment variable that holds your API key.

maxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens per model call. Lower for strict providers (Groq free tier ~8000); raise if large test files are cut off.

testCommand.description: Override the auto-detected test command, e.g. "npx jest --no-coverage". Use to add flags.

testEnv.description: Environment variables injected into every test-runner invocation, e.g. { "NODE_CONFIG_DIR": "packages/server/config" }.

debug.description: Set true to log every raw model prompt + response. Each target file gets its own log (lacuna-debug.<file>.txt). Equivalent to LACUNA_DEBUG=1.
